summary: Full backend + frontend smoke testing of PIZO MVP. 20/20 pytest backend tests pass after fixing one ObjectId serialization bug in /api/auth/register. All key frontend pages (Home, Venues, Creators, Events, Contact, Plans, Dashboard) render with correct data-testids, and the auth-modal -> register -> subscribe flow completes successfully showing 'Welcome aboard the crew!' toast.

minor.issue: Returned raw insert_one mutated dict which contained MongoDB ObjectId _id -> 500 'ObjectId not iterable' error. Filtered out _id alongside password_hash. Fix applied in /app/backend/server.py.

issues: Initial GET /api/auth/me returns 401 in console for anonymous visitors. Harmless but noisy; consider gating call when no token is present in localStorage.

action_items: Optional: in frontend AuthProvider, skip the /api/auth/me probe when no JWT token is stored to suppress 401 console noise.
Optional: audit all other create endpoints (venues, bookings, events, creators, subscriptions, contact) – they already pop _id, but register was missed. Already fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/auth/register was the only endpoint not popping _id from inserted dict before returning. Now patched.
/api/auth/google/session sets cookie with samesite=none + secure=True which is correct for cross-site Emergent flow; not exercised here.
Creators endpoint correctly assigns rank=1 to highest points and is sorted desc.
All endpoints under /api prefix; CORS allows credentials; JWT 7-day expiry – reasonable for MVP.
test_credentials: Generated unique TEST_*@example.com accounts at runtime. Seed users from /app/memory/test_credentials.md not pre-created; created on demand by register endpoint.
seed_data_creation: Backend startup seeds 6 venues, 4 events, 6 creators. Verified via tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable as regression. Use @example.com (not .test TLD – EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs). UPI/Razorpay payment path is MOCKED – /api/subscriptions returns status='active' immediately. Google OAuth flow only verifiable via real browser session.
rca of the issue: Register bug RCA: motor's insert_one mutates the passed dict to inject _id (ObjectId). The endpoint returned a dict-comprehension filtered only by 'password_hash', leaving _id in. FastAPI's JSON encoder choked on ObjectId. Mitigation: extended filter to ('password_hash','_id'). Repro: POST /api/auth/register with valid body -> 500. After fix: 200 with full user object.
